About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker FPLSF dominates today's ranking at position #1 with a composite score of 93.6, driven by exceptional long-term returns of 566.76% over one year while maintaining strong short-term momentum (2.29% daily, 12.31% monthly). The ticker passes all technical gates—trading above its 30, 50, 100, and 200-day moving averages—and shows consistent ratio progression across timeframes with 4 out of 5 ratio passes, though it exhibits thin trading volume (vol_ratio 0.434). PARR ranks second with a 317.4% one-year return and more balanced intermediate momentum (46.72% monthly, 58.14% quarterly), outperforming both SPY and QQQ across most periods while scoring positively on bad market days (+2.62), suggesting genuine strength rather than market-correlated gains. The stark contrast between FPLSF's extreme 566.76% annual return and PARR's 317.4% highlights a market segment experiencing highly differentiated momentum, with FPLSF's outperformance appearing driven by micro-cap or speculative positioning given its thin liquidity profile.
